title: chrysanthemum corymbosum var. achilleae
intro: Chrysanthemum corymbosum var. achilleae, also known as the Korean chamomile, is a variety of flowering plant native to the mountains of Korea and is a type of herbaceous perennial plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as insomnia, anxiety, and digestive problems. Its health benefits include promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat a range of ailments.
